cases.name: Signal Explainer Video
cases.purpose: Reference a short vertical data explainer with captions, metric reveal, evidence card, and chart motion.
cases.style: clean mobile-safe composition, restrained motion, exact text overlays, visible source boundary
disabled_when: formal video editing timeline is required
AI image output contains exact text or numbers
cases.notes: AI-generated scenes are backgrounds only. Captions, figures, and chart overlays must be rendered by code.
